title: Litobrochia contracta
taxonomy: Litobrochia contracta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Litobrochia and is native to South America. The plant is also known by its synonym, Gymnosporia contracta. The classification of Litobrochia contracta is further divided into its kingdom, as a Plantae, and its order, as an Apiales. The classification system used for Litobrochia contracta is based on the binomial nomenclature system developed by Carl Linnaeus.
benefits: Litobrochia contracta is a species of flowering plant that has been traditionally used in folk medicine. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
